data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of an audit trail with timestamp and IP, as specified in the linked use case. However, the evidence does not include any checks or API reads that confirm the existence of such an audit trail. The absence of relevant data or functionality related to the audit trail indicates a clear gap in meeting this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of an audit trail with timestamp and IP.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add audit trail verification
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the audit trail captures timestamps and IP addresses for user actions.
